response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong full-stack and polyglot development skills with exposure to distributed systems and cloud technologies, but lacks the required 8 years of C++ experience and direct technical leadership in cloud compute platforms. His background in developer tooling, open-source projects, and mentorship is valuable, but the role's core requirements are not fully met.
strengths: Extensive experience with distributed systems, microservices, and high-performance applications (e.g., at Sociomantic, Dunnhumby).
Proven mentorship and knowledge-sharing through workshops, talks, and open-source contributions (e.g., GISCollective, Fluent-Asserts).
Diverse technical background with exposure to cloud technologies (AWS CDK, Kubernetes) and infrastructure tooling.
concerns: Only ~1.5 years of C++ experience (at National Instruments), far below the 8-year requirement.
No explicit experience leading cloud compute platforms or large-scale infrastructure teams.
Technical leadership roles (e.g., Staff Engineer) focus more on full-stack/product work than the specialized cloud architecture this role demands.
